mapper.insert: MERGE INTO synced_inspection_records t USING (VALUES (#{id}, #{batchId}, #{inspectionDate}, #{totalCameras}, #{onlineCount}, #{offlineCount}, #{abnormalCount}, #{status}, #{syncVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) AS s(id, batch_id, inspection_date, total_cameras, online_count, offline_count, abnormal_count, status, sync_version, synced_at) ON t.id = s.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET batch_id = s.batch_id, inspection_date = s.inspection_date, total_cameras = s.total_cameras, online_count = s.online_count, offline_count = s.offline_count, abnormal_count = s.abnormal_count, status = s.status, sync_version = s.sync_version, synced_at = s.synced_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, batch_id, inspection_date, total_cameras, online_count, offline_count, abnormal_count, status, sync_version, synced_at) VALUES (s.id, s.batch_id, s.inspection_date, s.total_cameras, s.online_count, s.offline_count, s.abnormal_count, s.status, s.sync_version, s.synced_at)

INSERT INTO synced_inspection_records ( id, batch_id, inspection_date, total_cameras, online_count, offline_count, abnormal_count, status, sync_version, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{batchId}, #{inspectionDate}, #{totalCameras}, #{onlineCount}, #{offlineCount}, #{abnormalCount}, #{status}, #{syncVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE batch_id = VALUES(batch_id), inspection_date = VALUES(inspection_date), total_cameras = VALUES(total_cameras), online_count = VALUES(online_count), offline_count = VALUES(offline_count), abnormal_count = VALUES(abnormal_count), status = VALUES(status), sync_version = VALUES(sync_version), synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM synced_inspection_records WHERE inspection_date = #{date} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
